durationMs.description: Optional author-declared decoded-buffer duration in milliseconds. Bounded by `asset-loading.md` § 1.1 `maxAudioDurationMs`. When absent, the loader applies the same cap to the post-decode buffer length and refuses on overage with `pack.error.asset.audio-cap`.

channels.description: Optional author-declared channel count. Bounded by `asset-loading.md` § 1.1 `maxAudioChannels`. When absent, the loader applies the same cap to the decoded `AudioBuffer.numberOfChannels`.

sampleRate.description: Optional author-declared sample rate. Bounded by `asset-loading.md` § 1.1 `maxAudioSampleRate`. When absent, the loader applies the same cap to the decoded `AudioBuffer.sampleRate`.
